datafeed_id.description: A numerical character string that uniquely identifies the datafeed. This identifier can contain lowercase alphanumeric characters (a-z and 0-9), hyphens, and underscores. It must start and end with alphanumeric characters.

end.description: Refer to the description for the `end` query parameter.

start.description: Refer to the description for the `start` query parameter.

timeout.description: Refer to the description for the `timeout` query parameter.
